pourrezaSemanticdrivenBooleanQuery2023a.title: Towards semantic-driven boolean query formalization for biomedical systematic literature reviews

examples.query: Galactomannan detection for invasive aspergillosis in immunocompromised patients
examples.info:
Topic: GALACTOMANNAN DETECTION FOR INVASIVE ASPERGILLOSIS IN IMMUNOCOMPROMISED PATIENTS
BERT: immunocompromised, aspergillosis, patients, invasive, galactomannan
CLUSTERING BASED ON CONTEXTUAL EMBEDDINGS: (immunocompromised patients OR invasive OR galactomannan) AND (aspergillosis)
EXPANSION:(invasive OR cryptococcosis OR Patient immunosuppressed OR zygomycosis OR minimally-invasive OR galactomannan OR immunocompromised OR 1²-d-glucan OR immuno-compromised OR beta-d-glucan OR detections OR minimally OR detecting OR detection OR immunocompromized OR Aspergillosis) AND (aspergillosis)
examples.result: (invasive OR cryptococcosis OR Patient immunosuppressed OR zygomycosis OR minimally-invasive OR galactomannan OR immunocompromised OR 1²-d-glucan OR immuno-compromised OR beta-d-glucan OR detections OR minimally OR detecting OR detection OR immunocompromized OR Aspergillosis) AND (aspergillosis)

examples.query: Circulating antigen tests and urine reagent strips for diagnosis of active schistosomiasis in endemic areas

examples.result: ((found[tiab] OR urine[tiab] OR balance[tiab] OR "Aged, OR and over"[mh:noexp]) AND fluid[tiab])

examples.query: Prevalence of Differentiated Thyroid Cancer in Autopsy Studies Over Six Decades: A Meta-Analysis
examples.info: created in 4 steps (4 queries to Chat-GPT)
examples.result: (((differentiated thyroid cancer[mh] OR "differentiated thyroid"[All Fields] OR "thyroid carcinoma"[All Fields] OR "papillary microcarcinoma"[All Fields]) AND (prevalence[All Fields] OR incidence[mh] OR "etiology of"[All Fields] OR "risk factors"[All Fields] OR gender[All Fields] OR hormonal[All Fields] OR "nodular goiter"[All Fields] OR "Hashimoto’s thyroiditis"[mh] OR malignancy[mh] OR "concomitant lesion"[All Fields] OR tumor[All Fields] OR infiltrate[All Fields] OR fibrosis[All Fields] OR "early stages of development"[All Fields] OR frequency[All Fields])) AND (autopsy[mh] OR surgical[All Fields] OR material[All Fields] OR series[All Fields] OR specimens[All Fields] OR cases[All Fields]))
